description: 光影模板库 —— 这是产品的核心差异化模块，对标视频中北玄 v4.0 的'光影品质预览图'功能。每个模板背后是一段精调的英文光影提示词，建议前端配预览图。

items.preview_prompt_en: bright natural sunlight streaming through large windows, clear blue sky outside, soft shadows on the floor, balanced exposure, warm uplifting daytime atmosphere
items.description_zh: 明亮舒适的白天自然光，蓝天背景，光线柔和不刺眼。视频核心 6 模板之一。

items.preview_prompt_en: soft diffused daylight filtering through sheer curtains, overcast sky outside, even and gentle illumination, no harsh shadows, calming photographic quality
items.description_zh: 漫射柔和的自然光，无强烈方向感，适合干净构图。视频核心 6 模板之一。

items.preview_prompt_en: warm golden afternoon sunlight slanting through windows, honey-toned light pooling on the floor, long soft shadows, cozy lived-in atmosphere, lazy afternoon ambiance
items.description_zh: 午后斜阳，金黄色调，长长投影。视频核心 6 模板之一。

keywords_en: warm pendant lights against dark windows
items.preview_prompt_en: warm interior pendant and recessed lighting glowing against pitch-black night windows, layered ambient illumination with accent lights highlighting key surfaces, distant city lights visible outside, dramatic mood
items.description_zh: 夜间室内照明，温暖灯光与黑色窗外形成戏剧对比。视频核心 6 模板之一。

items.preview_prompt_en: magic-hour twilight light pouring through floor-to-ceiling windows, purple and orange gradient sky outside, dramatic warm-to-cool color temperature contrast, cinematic dusk ambiance
items.description_zh: 黄昏魔幻时刻，紫橙渐变天空，色温对比戏剧化。视频核心 6 模板之一。

items.preview_prompt_en: low-angle golden hour sunlight beaming through windows, every surface bathed in honey-warm light, soft elongated shadows, romantic and cinematic warmth
items.description_zh: 日落前一小时的金光，每个表面都被镀上蜂蜜色。

items.preview_prompt_en: deep cobalt blue twilight sky through panoramic windows, cool ambient blue light blending with warm interior lamps, sophisticated dusk mood, photographic high-end ambiance
items.description_zh: 日落后短暂的深蓝时刻，与室内暖灯形成强烈色温反差。

items.preview_prompt_en: soft pale rose-gold sunrise light through windows, slight morning mist outside, fresh and tranquil atmosphere, gentle awakening of the space
items.description_zh: 清晨第一缕光，淡粉金色调，宁静感。

items.preview_prompt_en: dramatic three-point cinematic lighting setup with strong key light from a side window, deep velvety shadows, high contrast chiaroscuro composition, magazine-cover quality
items.description_zh: 强烈侧光、深沉阴影、高反差。适合奢宅、酒店、艺术空间。

items.preview_prompt_en: intimate warm candlelight pools of glow on tabletops, low ambient warm lighting, soft amber tones, romantic and contemplative atmosphere
items.description_zh: 极低色温的烛光氛围，浪漫、亲密。

keywords_en: vibrant neon accents in dark room
items.preview_prompt_en: vibrant neon pink and cyan light bathing the interior, deep dark base with electric color accents, futuristic cyberpunk mood, reflective surfaces catching the neon
items.description_zh: 赛博朋克霓虹照明。

items.preview_prompt_en: soft natural daylight pouring down from a large central skylight, even illumination across the space, sculptural shadows on walls and floor, museum-quality light
items.description_zh: 顶部天窗光，雕塑感强。

keywords_en: soft directional light from a single window
items.preview_prompt_en: soft Rembrandt-style directional light from a single tall side window, painterly illumination across the room, gentle gradient from bright to shadow, fine art photography quality
items.description_zh: 单一侧窗光，绘画感强烈，适合人像和静物氛围。

items.preview_prompt_en: warm amber glow of a crackling fireplace casting flickering light across the room, deep shadows in the corners, intensely cozy winter atmosphere
items.description_zh: 壁炉跳动的暖光，冬季舒适感。

items.preview_prompt_en: professional studio softbox lighting with perfectly even illumination, no harsh shadows, magazine editorial photography quality, clean and controlled
items.description_zh: 专业影棚灯光，构图干净、无强阴影，适合产品/样板间。

items.preview_prompt_en: moody low-key lighting with deep velvety shadows, selective highlights illuminating key materials and textures, sophisticated dark aesthetic, gallery-quality atmosphere
items.description_zh: 暗调高级感。视频示例中提到的效果之一。

items.preview_prompt_en: soft diffused light from an overcast sky, even shadowless illumination, calm gray-day mood, perfect for showcasing materials and textures
items.description_zh: 阴天漫射光，最显材质细节。

items.preview_prompt_en: strongly backlit by floor-to-ceiling windows, furniture and details in soft silhouette, bright glowing window as the focal point, dreamy halation glow
items.description_zh: 强烈逆光，家具呈现剪影感。

items.preview_prompt_en: soft moody light through a window streaked with raindrops, gray atmosphere outside, cozy warm interior contrast, contemplative rainy-day mood
items.description_zh: 雨天窗景，治愈感强。

items.preview_prompt_en: bright cool daylight reflected off fresh snow outside, blue-white tinted light streaming through windows, crisp wintery atmosphere, warm interior contrast
items.description_zh: 雪景冬日光，冷调外景 + 暖调室内。
